title: ARCHIVED - How-to-Apply Video Tutorials - Canada.ca

## ARCHIVED - How-to-Apply Video Tutorials

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
Recruitment at Health Canada is about more than just attracting applicants; it's about attracting the right applicants. In this short presentation, we're going to show you how to read our job poster, how to self-screen and how to apply successfully.
Downloadable version
(Video File - 13 M )
